title: tengine.shadergen.cmd v1
description: Per-command outcome from the shadergen REPL. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SHADERGEN_CMD in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. The producer suppresses the high-volume 'step', 'run', and 'read' commands so consumers see only state-affecting commands.

cmd.description: shadergen command name as parsed by the REPL (e.g. 'race', 'load', 'screenshot')

ok.description: true if the command completed without error; false otherwise
